The '''Light Jedi Enclave''' was a stone structure located on the [[Yavin 4/Legends|the fourth moon of Yavin]]. It was home to two [[Jedi Sentinel/Legends|Jedi Sentinels]].
{{Struct-stub}}
[[File:Light_enclave2.jpg|thumb|left|right|220px|Inside the Light Jedi Enclave.]]

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Light_Jedi_Enclave_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
The Light Jedi Enclave was a location in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:SotF" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Light Jedi Enclave was added to the game with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 9 Notes for 29 June 04|Publish 9]]," on [[June 29]], [[2004]].<ref>{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?page=Recent%20Updates|text=Publish 9 Secrets of the Force}}</ref> The building was part of the pre-[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|NGE]] "[[W:c:swg:Jedi (pre-NGE)|Force Ranking System]]."<ref name="SWG:SotF" />
